title: ManifestPrinter.java
description:
The ManifestPrinter.java file is responsible for printing a manifest file. It collaborates with other files in the same directory to load the manifest file from a given path and print its contents. The architectural role of this file is to provide a way to output manifest data in a readable format.

The file uses the Apache Hadoop MapReduce library and the Java IO library to perform its core logic. It takes a path to the manifest file as input and outputs the contents of the manifest file.
